_comment: Columns the generator consciously leaves unset (DB default/NULL applies). The doctor errors on any unset column NOT listed here — when the schema grows a column, either populate it in a builder or acknowledge it here with a reason.
user_data.lastAccess: runtime bookkeeping, set by the app on login
user_data.statusUser: runtime bookkeeping, set by the app
user_data.webPreferences: DB default preferences JSON is correct
village_grant.userGroupId: demo grants are per-user, not per-group
member.member_level: CE-era field, not exercised in demo
member.printed_newsletter: ops field, not exercised in demo
notification_event.failed_at: demo data has no failed sends
fcv_submission.fuzzyVolunteerName: populated by the app's FCV fuzzy-match intake
fcv_submission.fuzzyMemberName: populated by the app's FCV fuzzy-match intake
